mapper.select: select m.id, m.member_nickname, m.member_handle, m.member_bio, (select f.file_name from tbl_member_profile_file mpf join tbl_file f on mpf.id = f.id where mpf.member_id = m.id and mpf.profile_image_type = 'profile' limit 1) as member_profile_file_name, (select mm.member_nickname from tbl_follow fl2 join tbl_member mm on fl2.follower_id = mm.id where fl2.following_id = m.id and fl2.follower_id != #{memberId} limit 1) as follower_intro from tbl_member m where m.member_role = 'expert' and m.member_status = 'active' and m.id != #{memberId} and m.id not in (select fl.following_id from tbl_follow fl where fl.follower_id = #{memberId}) order by m.created_datetime desc limit #{criteria.count} offset #{criteria.offset}
select count(*) from tbl_member where member_role = 'expert' and member_status = 'active'
